title: IIM Ahmedabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIM Ahmedabad)
short_info: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIM Ahmedabad) Research Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. Has been announced through the IIM Ahmedabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Computer Science, Information Systems, Data Science, Machine Learning, Applied Mathematics, Quantitative Economics,
qualification.details: PhD in Computer Science, Information Systems, Data Science, Machine Learning, Applied Mathematics, Quantitative Economics, or closely related fields. Strong background in network science, graph analytics and simulation. Solid foundation in machine learning, statistics, and mathematical modelling. Strong expertise in R or Python and good familiarity with scientific computing libraries. Working knowledge of explainable AI techniques (e.g., SHAP, LIME, counterfactual explanations). Strong written and oral communication skills, with peer-reviewed publications.

salary_details.pay_scale: Commensurate with qualification and experience and as per IIMA guidelines
salary_details.details: Commensurate with qualification and experience and as per IIMA guidelines.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Ahmedabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Ahmedabad Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Research Associate (Post-Doctoral) position at IIM Ahmedabad is 30th May 2026. Ensure all your details are submitted accurately before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a PhD in Computer Science, Information Systems, Data Science, Machine Learning, Applied Mathematics, Quantitative Economics, or closely related fields. A strong background in network science, graph analytics, simulation, machine learning, statistics, and mathematical modelling is also essential.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive as per the available information.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Research Associate (Post-Doctoral) position will be commensurate with the candidate's qualification and experience, following IIM Ahmedabad's guidelines.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for this position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of eligible candidates, followed by online or in-person interviews.

faq.question: Q6. What technical skills are required for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: Strong expertise in R or Python, along with good familiarity with scientific computing libraries, is required. Working knowledge of explainable AI techniques like SHAP and LIME is also beneficial.

faq.question: Q7. Does IIM Ahmedabad offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or age relaxation details for this particular post. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification for any such information.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of IIM Ahmedabad or the provided application link before the last date, 30th May 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What kind of experience is preferred for this role?
faq.answer: While a PhD is the primary qualification, a strong background in specific technical areas like network science, graph analytics, simulation, machine learning, and statistics is crucial. Peer-reviewed publications are also highlighted as a requirement.
